Crew Carwash has provided such a great environment to work in. The type of people that you get to work with is truly amazing. From the upper management all the way down to the associates, you get to work with people who actually care about you. There are so many opportunities to progress in this company and there are so many great benefits, from the healthcare benefits, schooling assistance program, referral program...

evidence.role: Current employee - Fast Track Operations Manager
evidence.text: Better than average benefits. Weekend off rotation model (rare to find in any customer facing role). Great PTO (no sick days) Great overall culture, and the training is top notch. Very repetitive work that can lead to burnout Being constantly understaffed Working in extreme weather conditions Micromanagement from upper level management. Work and life balance can be tough with working late on weekends. Shift Manager
401k contribution does not start immediately, you do not get a lot of personal/sick time during first year of employment. Great company, tons of benefits and great people to work with.

- They have a blackout period for PTO as a manager. Forget about going to see family for Christmas or taking a vacation over a weekend during our busy season, because it's not allowed. - No sick days, you have to use your own PTO for that, limited as it might be. And if your location is understaffed? Forget about taking PTO at all. - Expectations are extremely high for assistants and above, for very little pay. Movi...

Customers will harass and demean you and other members of your team. They are never held accountable. Poor pay for a ridiculous schedule. Extremely difficult to have any work life balance due to the nature of Crew's shift work schedule. Every conversation MUST follow the Crew script or you will be at risk of losing your job, even if you made a personal connection with a customer and they are satisfied with their vis...
Sometimes the job requires working after hours so the work/life balance might not be the best Great Place to Work!!!
no work life balance since such short staff very rewarding

evidence.role: Current employee - Part Time Shift Manager
evidence.text: - Unique Tasks, you will become a jack of all trades working at Crew. It is not uncommon to learn about plumbing, electricity, pneumatics, landscaping, etc. - Long Days, every week you can expect to have early mornings and late nights - Stressful Situations, we are working with customers who are bringing their second largest investment to our facility, their vehicles. If we do not meet their expectations it is not u...
The only downside of working at Crew is the weather. This is a weather permitting job, and when the weather doesnât cooperate, you have to make do. Anonymous
Growth can be a little hard at times, but I believe they are doing it well and really care about helping revamp older stores while at the same time building new ones. Passion for employees
The only con is my commute, but I don't mind the drive into the office because the Support Center provides a great work environment. A great place to work!
Some seasons are longer than others, and outside of management their isn't much room for pay increases. Work Environment
If I had to pick absolutely something, it would be the customer service aspect. Customers are not always fun to deal with, but not every customer is going to be kind. Working at Crew
Crew, like every company, isn't for everyone. It is a very fast paced environment with high standards. If you do your job well and do it with a smile, you will go far! When your here, your family

The biggest opportunity that many employees. complain about is being outside in the weather. Please know, washing cars does require us to be outside. Please understand what that means before applying. There is a reason it's a best place to work!
As the service industry is, this is not a 9-5 job. The schedule can be somewhat sporadic at times. Rewarding, Fun, Exciting place to work with advancement opportunities
Working in the elements is not always great, but having the appropriate uniform definitely helps. Very Fun Place to Work with Great Coworkers and Supportive Management

There really honestly isn't much without being nit picky, there are early mornings and sometimes it gets pretty busy at times, but thats just part of the job because of how many customers are helped everyday! A great place for growth and opportunity!

You canât trust anyone and you will be exploited, unappreciated and left wondering how they have such a âhighâ rating. Company culture can become a little toxic. Crew is very keen on always putting on a face to customers, ie. always smiling and being positive. This is fine but often I can feel like associates managers are being fake towards each other which creates a toxic work environment. Also, they care too much about getting hours perfect to fictitious quotas, if it's a slower day you are very likely to get your hours highly red...

Not safe! Slippery in the winter and dehydration in the summer. I've seen many pass out due to working too long in 100 degree weather using 100+ degree hot water to get bugs off. As said above the cleaning chemicals used nightly are hazardous and usually cause skin irritation. Terrible hours in extreme weather. Micro managed from top down to bottom level
